meta.title: Asociación Hechos — Social inclusion and job integration for migrants
meta.description: Free training, employability support and real accompaniment for migrants. Meet our mission, our impact, and how you can help. In Spanish and English.

hero.subtitle: We walk alongside young people, migrants and families so no circumstance takes away their right to a future with real opportunities.
hero.micro: No cost · Spanish & English · Non-profit organization
hero.imageCaption: Illustration of our community — real photo coming soon
hero.float1Body: Employability for young people facing social disadvantage
hero.float2Body: Coaching so every young person leads their own future

mission.title: We don't support projects. We support people.
mission.body: Asociación Hechos works to restore the dignity of people whose social, economic or cultural circumstances took it away — with special focus on children, young people and migrants. We do this through education, employability and social inclusion, walking closely with each person's journey.
mission.pillar1Body: Training and job-placement pathways for young people facing social disadvantage.
mission.pillar2Body: Academic and career guidance in schools and vocational training centers.
mission.pillar3Body: Guidance and paperwork support so access to rights and resources is real, not just possible.
mission.pillar4Body: We support unaccompanied foreign minors until they come of age, with a close, empathetic approach.
mission.pillar5Body: Coaching so every young person becomes the protagonist of their own path and future.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every program, every decision and every step we walk with someone.
values.item1Body: We work so every person can exercise their rights on equal footing, without exception.
values.item2Body: We treat every person as the protagonist of their own life, never as a case to be solved.
values.item3Body: We see every origin, culture or condition as a source of richness, never a reason for exclusion.
values.item4Body: We build spaces where your starting point never determines how far you can go.
values.item5Body: We aim for an impact that lasts, caring for the economic, social and emotional dimensions alike.
values.item6Body: We act with consistency and responsibility, not just good intentions.
values.item7Body: What we say and what we do are the same thing — trust is built with actions, not speeches.
values.item8Body: We aim to do things better every time, with real quality and openness to improve.

impact.title: Impact you can measure
impact.subtitle: These are the indicators that matter to us. We publish verified figures — never inflated estimates.
impact.pendingNote: Will be published once the association confirms the official figure.
impact.programsNote: Creando Puentes, Oriéntate, Inform@, Hogares de Acogida and Enfoca

programs.title: Our programs
programs.subtitle: Five real programs, each with its own purpose within one shared mission.
programs.item1Body: Improves employability for young people aged 16 to 35 facing social disadvantage, through personalized training and job-placement pathways.
programs.item1Benefit3: Job matching and hiring events with local companies
programs.item2Body: Academic and career guidance service for schools and vocational training centers in Burgos and Palencia.
programs.item2Benefit3: Development of social and transversal skills
programs.item3Body: Specialized information and guidance for migrants: immigration paperwork, degree recognition and access to aid.
programs.item3Benefit2: Support with Social Security, tax and city-hall paperwork
programs.item4Body: Care and support for unaccompanied foreign minors until they come of age, with an empathetic approach.
programs.item4Benefit2: Training for autonomy and independent living
programs.item5Body: A coaching program where young people build personal, professional and emotional skills to become protagonists of their own future.
programs.item5Benefit3: One-on-one support through their own process

courses.title: A preview of our course catalog
courses.subtitle: A preview using the same topics from our real workshops: résumés, interviews and digital skills.

successStories.subtitle: Everyone who comes through Hechos has a before and an after. This section will grow with real stories, told by the people who lived them — with their permission, their name, their photo.
successStories.ctaTitle: Do you have a story with Hechos?
successStories.ctaBody: If this platform was part of your journey, we want to tell it — with your permission and in your own way.

news.title: Latest news
news.subtitle: This is where we'll share Asociación Hechos's real news, activities and posts, once this section connects to our official content.
news.excerptFallback: This post's summary will appear here once it's connected to our real news.
news.instagramTitle: In the meantime, follow us on Instagram
news.instagramBody: That's where we share the real day-to-day of our programs and activities.

partners.title: Companies that transform lives
partners.subtitle: These are the real ways your company can join the mission — from posting an opening to training mentors inside your own team.
partners.logosBody: We don't have confirmed partner companies yet — be the first to appear here.
partners.modality1Body: Post real openings and hire talent that already arrives trained and supported — no middlemen, no cost.
partners.modality2Body: Train your own staff as mentors: a young person visits your company and learns closely, guided by someone from your team.
partners.modality3Body: Share your expertise in job-readiness workshops — résumés, interviews, social skills — within our programs.
partners.modality4Body: Sign a socio-labor insertion agreement and turn the collaboration into a lasting commitment, not a one-off gesture.
partners.modality5Body: Bring your team in as volunteers for workshops and activities — the same closeness we ask of any volunteer, now coming from your company.
partners.stat2Label: openings already shared in the community
partners.ctaTitle: Want your company to join in?
partners.ctaBody: Tell us what profiles you're looking for and we'll help you find them.
partners.cta: I want to become a partner

howToHelp.title: How can you collaborate?
howToHelp.subtitle: These are the real ways to support Asociación Hechos's mission — choose the one that fits you best.
howToHelp.item1Body: Every financial contribution directly sustains the programs that restore dignity and real opportunities to those who need them.
howToHelp.item2Body: A recurring fee makes you a steady part of the mission — an ongoing commitment, not a one-time gift.
howToHelp.item2Cta: I want to become a member
howToHelp.item3Body: Give your time in educational support, administration, events or direct outreach — there's a place for whatever skills you bring.
howToHelp.item4Body: Hire talent that's already prepared, train your team as mentors, or sign a socio-labor insertion agreement.
howToHelp.item5Body: Donate products or professional services — every expense we avoid becomes more budget directly for the programs.
howToHelp.item5Cta: I want to donate products or services

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does the platform cost?
faq.a1: Nothing. Hechos is and will always be free for the people who use it.
faq.q2: Do I need documents to sign up?
faq.a2: Just an email address. We don't ask for immigration status or documents to create your account.
faq.q3: Can I use the platform in English?
faq.a3: Yes. The whole platform is available in Spanish and English from day one.
faq.a4: Registered users and the association's team. Every posting is moderated before it goes live.
faq.q5: What happens with my personal data?
faq.a5: It's stored encrypted and never shared or sold to third parties.
faq.a6: Not yet, but it's a feature we're preparing for an upcoming version.

contact.title: Have a question that's not answered here?
contact.body: Write to us and we'll reply in your language.

placeholderPages.platformTitle: We're building this part of Hechos

placeholderPages.legalBody: This document is being prepared. If you have questions about how we protect your data or the terms of use, write to us directly.
